hero.headline: *Old-school service* meets Alabama weather
hero.subheadline: Licensed Montgomery roofers who answer the phone and show up when we say we will.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Roofs Built for Alabama
services_section.subheading: From storm damage to complete replacement — we handle it all

services.title: Roof Replacement
services.description: Complete tear-off and installation with materials built for Alabama heat and storms.

services.title: Storm Damage Repair
services.description: Fast response for wind, hail, and tree damage. Insurance claim assistance included.

services.title: Leak Repair
services.description: Track down the source and fix it right the first time.

services.title: Roof Inspections
services.description: Thorough assessment with honest recommendations for repair or replacement.

about.heading: Montgomery Roofing Since Day One
about.body: We're the Montgomery team that shows up when we say we will. Real people answering the phone — not a call center.

reviews.name: Judi W.
reviews.text: Second roof they've done for me — first was 20 years ago. Great crew, fair prices, highly recommend.

cta.heading: Ready for a Roof That Lasts?
cta.body: Get your free estimate from Montgomery's trusted roofing team. Fair prices, honest work, old-school service.
